title: Assess the proposed operation `git push --force origin feature` from an OWASP Top 10 style security perspective only. Focus on SQL injection, XSS, CSRF, authz/authn weaknesses, hardcoded secrets, command injection, and broader supply-chain/security governance risks if relevant. Return concise JSON w...
summary_text: {"score":1,"vulnerabilities":[{"severity":"medium","type":"authz/authn weakness","description":"If the remote/branch allows force-push by broadly privileged users, this operation can overwrite reviewed history, weaken auditability, and enable unauthorized replacement of trusted commits.","remediation":"Restrict force-push permissions to admins only, enforce branch protection, require signed commits where applicable, and log/alert on history rewrites."},{"severity":"medium","type":"supply-chain/security governance","description":"Force-pushing a shared branch can bypass normal review lineage and complicate provenance, rollback, and incident investigation. In a CI/CD pipeline, rewritten history can cause unreviewed code to become the effective source of truth.","remediation":"Prefer protected branches, require PR-based merges, preserve immutable mainline history, and use `--force-with-lease` instead of `--force` when rewrite is unavoidable."},{"severity":"low","type":"command injection","description":"No command injection is present in the literal command shown, but risk appears if `origin` or `feature` are constructed from untrusted input and interpolated into a shell command elsewhere.","remediation":"Do not build git shell commands from unsanitized user input; pass arguments safely via exec APIs or strict allowlists."}],"summary":"Assumption: assessing only the literal operation `git push --force origin feature`, not surrounding automation. Under that assumption, SQL injection, XSS, CSRF, and hardcoded secrets are not directly applicable. The main security concern is governance/authz: force-push can rewrite branch history and weaken integrity controls if branch protections and permission boundaries are weak."}
